{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Silent Sage
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Reaper (novel)|Reaper]]
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Silent Sage]] is one of the cult leaders who arrived.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Silent Sage]] is [[Balari]]'s little sister.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|“and isn’t the Silent Sage your little sister?”<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
